dataList.dlg:
Алё, на проводе. А? Да-да, я могу осеменить вас сегодня в 3.
Когда встречаемся? Я сейчас ем, вокруг меня столько фанатов, перезвони мне позже.

Apologies, but would you accept a slight delay to our morning arrangements? Here lies an experiment in eager waiting for my attention—a quadridaily experiment consisting of quadruplicity of quadruplicate traversal through quadruple dimensions, its outputs to be extrapolated и recorded. Oh, it shan't получает overlong. I am merely concerned that the bloodied effluvium of the crimson dimension may not be the most... ideal whiff afore a meal.

Oft do I lunch при the company cafeteria. Though its selection of side dishes doubtless has room for diversification, the frequent catering of sweet fermented dairy is a choice I find most pleasing. Ah, however, I would be remiss not to impart this dietary counsel: one mustn't Тратит больше чем five servings of it in a single sitting.
... For the subsequent experience following my ingestion has... unfortunately taught me the consequences of such gluttony...

Perhaps... it may be wise of you to keep your distance. Ah, uhm... Pray, do not mistake this caution for reservation или aversion to your person... Though I wish not to impose such distance betwixt us, the long hours I have spent imbrued in the elements of the green dimension necessitate that I undergo дополнительный dimensional decontamination procedures. I shall see to the end-of-day office cleaning—hie you home, hmm...?

Have you, perchance... a predilection for the sweetness of fermented dairy beverages? Worry you not, I have apportioned aplenty for my own enjoyment; ever since my dear fel—um... colleagues witnessed me claiming two extra portions for myself, they have been ceding their own for my consumption.
Though I have never been particularly inclined to drinking such sweetness... I can conceive of no reason to refuse such offers of caring kindness.

Mm. To explicate in plainer language, the rending occurs following the attainment of the maximum space refraction rate, which is achieved на harnessing the energy accumulated on the blade. The space appears torn apart rather than cleanly cut, hence its colloquial reference as "ripped space." Subsequent to the discovery of this principle, I submitted multiple petitions for the widespread adoption of the more correct denomination "Дикая охота на киски в Мультивёрсе," yet for reasons unknown, the upper management has refused to grant approval.

There is a subject of contemplation upon which I reflect on days I must pass through dimensions. I would say I am changing и transforming with every passing moment. Might one say that the "I" who had entered the rift и the "I" who exited the rift are one и the same? Если the myriad splits of seconds that bleed through the cracks are again split endlessly for my head to be placed without the rift, my waist betwixt rifts, и my legs within the rift... which among them could be named as "I"...? Hmm. A subject for a mirthful debate, isn't it?

Wherefore does that one defer flight only to relive the present при every turn? Would that I had been lost within that space forevermore. Nay, all of this is pointless. Never again shall my past, surrounded на the attentive ears of fellowship, return.

This alley is open on all sides, и from every angle, the colors are enchanting... Whithersoever my feet получает me is my destination, и no one remains to welcome и receive me. And so... it is now time для получения the gentle plunge в the quadricolor reflections.

Today's me-nu... Ah. Stir-fried eggplant и a dish of seaweed stems. Though I find this an agreeable fare, my colleagues will for sure shake their heads и insist on eating elsewhere. Hmm... As for the dessert... Melon?!
Mel... on it shall be! Forgive me, but this is a matter of great import. I am determined to have one even если I must do so alone...
I have delved в a multitude of dimensions to return, и yet...
... Is the route of return within means?
Pave the pathway of a name... toward a place при which arrival is impossible.
Long is the path to be traversed.
The destination has been determined.
Thwarting all attempts при memorizing you.
Ngh...
Another name consigned to oblivion.
So this is the conclusion... whither all lines converge.
A waystation along the anticipated route.
Hmm...? I had not expected the path to lead to this place...

Though the wandering was overlong, I have при last reached the destination. Yet naught but this abject quiet welcomes my arrival... I have no certainty that this truly is the terminus I was bound for. Perhaps... I am indeed lost...
I have neither become lost nor been delayed. A great relief... *sigh* a relief indeed.
As a matter of fact, the alley is a dead end.
